steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between ArcelorMittal Orbit and Cumil the Sewer Worker. The notes describe many differences: the artworks have different creators, different materials or forms, and different cities. The shared feature relevant to the student's goal is that both works are displayed in public places.

steps.title: Reject differences and singles
steps.content:
• Choice B emphasizes a difference by saying only ArcelorMittal Orbit is in London, England.
  • Choice C is false because the works have different creators in the notes.
  • Choice D describes only Cumil the Sewer Worker and does not compare it with ArcelorMittal Orbit.
The remaining option states the similarity that both artworks are on display at public locations. The answer is A.
